text.title: Agent Eval Cost Budget Policy Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply agent-eval-cost-budget-policy. Each step names its input, action, and output. Steps may not be reordered without explicit deviation note.

step.name: Inventory eval suite by capability tag.
step.description: Input: eval suite. Action: Tag each example.. Output: tagged suite.

step.name: Stratified-sample ≤20% as fast subset.
step.description: Input: tagged suite. Action: Sample.. Output: fast subset.

step.name: Define adversarial set + weekly slot.
step.description: Input: red-team set. Action: Author cadence.. Output: adversarial slot.

step.name: Set cost ceiling + judge fallback rules.
step.description: Input: finance + ML platform. Action: Configure.. Output: ceiling + fallback.
step.note: Step 4. Required input: finance + ML platform.

step.name: Version `evals/policy.md`.
step.description: Input: all above. Action: Author and commit.. Output: policy.md.
